ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "project_category" TEXT /* Category of the project */,
  "project_subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the project */,
  "project_priority" INTEGER /* Priority level of the project (1 being highest) */,
  "project_progress" REAL /* Progress of the project (as a percentage) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Expected end date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the task belongs to */,
  "task_description" TEXT /* Description of the task */,
  "task_category" TEXT /* Category of the task */,
  "task_subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the task */,
  "task_priority" INTEGER /* Priority level of the task (1 being highest) */,
  "task_progress" REAL /* Progress of the task (as a percentage) */,
  "estimation_hours" INTEGER /* Estimated effort for the task in hours */,
  "deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for the task */,
  "finished" INTEGER /* Completion status of the task (true if finished, false otherwise) */,
  "assigned_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to the task */,
  "task_created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the task */,
  "task_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the task */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the task was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the task was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_task_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("task_created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_task_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("task_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_assigned_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, manager) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "user_password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "user_salt" TEXT /* Salt used for password hashing */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task the comment is associated with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  "comment_parent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (for nested comments) */,
  "comment_created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the comment */,
  "comment_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_comments_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_comments_comment_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("comment_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_comments_comment_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("comment_created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_milestones" (
  "milestone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each milestone */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the milestone belongs to */,
  "milestone_name" TEXT /* Name of the milestone */,
  "milestone_category" TEXT /* Category of the milestone */,
  "milestone_priority" INTEGER /* Priority level of the milestone (1 being highest) */,
  "milestone_status" TEXT /* Status of the milestone (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "milestone_progress" REAL /* Progress of the milestone (as a percentage) */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the milestone */,
  "completed_date" TEXT /* Date when the milestone was completed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("milestone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_milestones_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task the history entry is associated with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., status update, assignment change) */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "history_category" TEXT /* Category of the history entry */,
  "history_priority" INTEGER /* Priority level of the history entry (1 being highest) */,
  "history_created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the history entry */,
  "history_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the history entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_history_history_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("history_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_history_history_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("history_created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_history_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id")
)
